topic: Why HIIT burns fat hours after the workout
caption: Discover the secret to burning fat hours after your workout! 🏋️‍♀️ HIIT (High-Intensity Interval Training) is a game-changer for weight loss. Here are the science-backed facts: 📊 1) HIIT increases EPOC (excess post-exercise oxygen consumption) by 10-15%, boosting metabolism for hours. 🕒 2) It enhances fat oxidation by 20-30% due to increased epinephrine and norepinephrine. 💪 3) HIIT also improves insulin sensitivity, reducing the risk of type 2 diabetes. 🌟 Save this so you don't lose it. Share with someone who needs to see this. Follow @healthrecode for daily science-backed health. Don't forget — your future body will thank you! 🙏 #HIIT #FatLoss #WeightLoss #FitnessMotivation #WorkoutTips #HealthBenefits #ExerciseScience #WeightLossTips
